title: URGENT CARE - 211info
text: MADRAS MEDICAL GROUP URGENT CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides urgent care services for people with minor illnesses or injuries. 76 NE 12th Street Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 2pm-6pm, Saturday 8am-1pm, by appointment only Email (541) 475-3874 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 475-3874 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, other private insurance or out of pocket payment. 20% discount offered to uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, Saturday 8am-1pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on 12th Street, across from the St Charles Madras hospital Services: Urgent Care Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - GENERAL MEDICAL CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - POSTPARTUM DEPRESSION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MADRAS MEDICAL GROUP
